pains.summary: Cannot draw clear line from ad spend to pipeline to bookings
pains.quote: we're investing so much money and paid, how are we drawing that line from a dollar in ad spend to a dollar in pipeline and a dollar in bookings. Yeah. We've had a really tough time doing that.
pains.speaker: Jasonbeddall

pains.summary: Last-touch attribution creates misleading direct traffic attribution
pains.quote: it leads to what I think most would expect is a is an unusually large amount of direct traffic attribution. Which makes sense in a cookie list world and all sorts of things.
pains.speaker: Jasonbeddall

pains.summary: Cannot see journey before last touch to understand influence
pains.quote: what did they do right before that? What's the journey to get there? Did paid ads influence it, you know, a week ago or two weeks ago or whatever And be able to, to draw a little more clear kind of direct influence instead of maybe last touch influence.
pains.speaker: Jasonbeddall

pains.summary: Salesforce campaigns only capture one touch per day, missing multi-touch influence
pains.quote: if there's two campaigns that affected a contact or three within the same day, it's only capturing one of those in Salesforce. So we're, we're only looking at one of the things in the overall attribution just within one day.
pains.speaker: Mary Bellows

pains.summary: Data scattered across platforms requiring manual jumping between systems
pains.quote: we're just trying to draw the line from, from start to finish and we keep, we have to jump platforms I think to get it instead of being able to aggregate that data in one place and see the
pains.speaker: Jasonbeddall

pains.summary: Homegrown attribution solution only achieves decent approximation, not trusted
pains.quote: I would say like a, like a decent approximation of data by channel. I don't, I don't trust it fully. Like I don't think it's a hundred percent right? I don't think it's 90% right. I think it's it's as close, it's as close as we're probably gonna get.
pains.speaker: Jasonbeddall

pains.summary: Salesforce setup with reversed lead-to-contact flow creates data challenges
pains.quote: our Salesforce is set up a little bit differently. It's been a challenge for us where we have multiple leads associated with contacts where it's typically they'll start as a contact, become a lead. We do things reversed.
pains.speaker: Mary Bellows

tools_switched_from.tool: Homegrown attribution (custom fields in HubSpot and Salesforce)
tools_switched_from.reason: Could only achieve decent approximation, not trusted for accuracy
tools_switched_from.quote: Essentially we've tried to build it on our own capture fields and HubSpots and the sales force. And it's gotten us, I would say like a, like a decent approximation of data by channel. I don't, I don't trust it fully.
tools_switched_from.speaker: Jasonbeddall

political_tussles.summary: PE firm wants clean last-touch ROI; marketing believes buyers don't work linearly
political_tussles.quote: I think finance people love last touch attribution 'cause it's very clean and sort of linear and I don't think that's how buyers work. So there's a, there's a little bit of a sell job on our end too. You know, when I told my boss we were having this conversation and why he was like, you know, it sounds, and he marketing it sounds s murky. So it's like, you know, well it sounds, it sounds kind of nebulous and like, you know, PE firms are like, we don't care about influence. We just wanna know about, you know, so there's a little bit of, it sounds there's a little bit of that too.
political_tussles.speaker: Jasonbeddall

contrarians.claim: Last touch attribution may be a losing battle, not just suboptimal
contrarians.why_unusual: Most vendors pitch multi-touch as better; client suggests last-touch may be fundamentally futile in modern environment
contrarians.quote: Also maybe think last touch attribution is maybe a losing battle.
contrarians.speaker: Jasonbeddall

contrarians.claim: Finance loves last-touch because it's clean, even though it's wrong about how buyers behave
contrarians.why_unusual: Explicitly acknowledges the political appeal of bad data to finance stakeholders; most buyers hide this tension
contrarians.quote: I think finance people love last touch attribution 'cause it's very clean and sort of linear and I don't think that's how buyers work.
contrarians.speaker: Jasonbeddall

contrarians.claim: PE firms explicitly don't care about influence, only direct attribution
contrarians.why_unusual: Blunt statement that PE firms reject influence-based measurement entirely; most vendors pretend PE cares about full-funnel
contrarians.quote: PE firms are like, we don't care about influence. We just wanna know about, you know, so there's a little bit of, it sounds there's a little bit of that too.
contrarians.speaker: Jasonbeddall

best_about_revsure.summary: Platform makes complex information easy to digest even for non-go-to-market stakeholders
best_about_revsure.quote: the kudos we get from our teams is kind of how easy the information is to digest. It's a lot of information, don't get me wrong. But even to non go-to market voices and, and stakeholders, they can understand like, oh, okay, it's not quite a Venn diagram, but I understand who is what and getting where.
best_about_revsure.speaker: E.T. Mac

best_about_revsure.summary: Ability to track anonymous visitors back to first interactions before becoming known
best_about_revsure.quote: those first interactions three weeks ago from that, from that gcl, from that Google display ad, we can go back and track that.
best_about_revsure.speaker: Alex Cox

long_term.win: Prove compelling use case to secure budget from finance
long_term.quote: I think we'll have to prove a pretty compelling use case before we can get the, you know, before we have finance go find money somewhere.
long_term.speaker: Jasonbeddall

long_term.win: Understand channel ROI for new PE firm ownership
long_term.quote: this is new for us and this is one of the things they're, they're really big on is understanding channel ROI.
long_term.speaker: Jasonbeddall

before_state.pain_summary: Cannot trust attribution data; last-touch creates misleading direct traffic; multi-platform data fragmentation; reversed lead-contact Salesforce setup
